query: Wrapping up a quiet work call and I want arrivals not to hear anything. Start robot vacuum 1 in the office at the right time and set robot vacuum 1 in the office to Running state. Time it so dishwasher 1 in the kitchen and robot vacuum 1 in the office finish at the same time with robot vacuum 1 Stopped state.

evaluation_result.detail: Episode failed: explicit finish action is required.
